intro.title: Hello and Welcome to My Website!
intro.description: This is my personal portfolio where I share programming projects, verified financial research, playable projects, and a pixel art studio. Scroll to explore — my resume is embedded below in a lazy-loading viewer and available to download. Pick a theme from the dock on the right; every one is a full personality, not a palette swap.

programming.title: 💻 Programming Works
programming.description: This site is the exhibit — view its source live from GitHub.

posts.title: 📁 Articles & Projects
posts.description: Project reports and updates, rendered in the on-site viewer — no more "file too large to embed."

finance.title: 💸 The Financial Liberty Project
finance.description: Research deliverables with receipts. Every number is dated; every contested claim carries an honesty flag.

arcade.title: 🕹️ Games & Projects Arcade
arcade.description: Play the Pixel Art Studio right here, then preview everything else without leaving the page.

connect.title: 🪴 Connect
connect.description: All my links, natively — Linktree blocks embedding, so the tree grows here instead.

projects.title: Junior to High School Haas Hall Works
projects.description: My early programming works from Haas Hall Academy

projects.title: University of Arkansas Works
projects.description: Projects and coursework from University of Arkansas

projects.title: Northwest Technical Institute Works
projects.description: Technical projects from Northwest Technical Institute — served through the on-site PDF viewer once the compressed PDF lands in files/ (see README step). Until then the OneDrive links below keep working.

arcade.title: 🎨 Pixel Art Studio Max
arcade.description: 16×16 studio — pick a color, paint, undo, save as PNG. Playable right here, no loading.

arcade.title: Shuffle Rush
arcade.description: Frutiger Metro rhythm action, live on itch.io. Built with Rosebud.ai + Phaser 3.
arcade.embedNote: Paste your itch.io embed iframe URL here (Distribute → Embed game). itch's Cloudflare layer intermittently blocks off-site frames, so the open-in-new-tab fallback always stays visible.

arcade.title: NWAero Grid Dashboard
arcade.description: Regional weather + traffic dashboard with real-time API aggregation. Collab build.

arcade.title: Coding Terminal Collective
arcade.description: Terminal coding collective with DevOps tooling, refactored from the academic repo.

arcade.title: Create Your Own Maxfolio
arcade.description: Full-stack networking parody site (Next.js, Tailwind, Supabase, Vercel).
arcade.embedNote: The _vercel_share token expires and Vercel preview deployments send X-Frame-Options: DENY. Swap in a production domain to enable live embedding.

arcade.title: SkyDisorder
arcade.description: Satirical single-file Canvas 2D arcade golf — 12K+ lines, census-verified, four phases complete.

arcade.title: Getting Through
arcade.description: 3D parody fighter in pre-production — Unity / Godot 4 stack, targeting itch.io + Roblox.

arcade.title: Winnow
arcade.description: Client-side, zero-dependency web app for swipe-based social network triage and ranking. v1.0.0-rc.1.

arcade.title: Keystone
arcade.description: 130K-line local-first AI agent platform (Rust, Tauri, React) — agents on your hardware, under your keys.
